scope: Add D1-backed presentation slot scheduling with role-scoped visibility, admin/program-teacher scheduling, same-location conflict blocking, and audit events.
changes: Added migrations/0006_presentation_slots.sql with presentation slot status, outline status, location, duration, check-out/check-in, and audit-ready ownership fields.
Added /api/presentation-slots GET to return only slots the current user can access through canAccessStudent.
Added /api/presentation-slots POST to allow admin/program-teacher scheduling for in-scope active students.
Blocked same-location overlapping presentation slots with a 409 presentation_slot_conflict response.
Wrote audit events for denied scheduling attempts, conflict blocks, and successful presentation slot scheduling.

Added tests/presentation-slots.integration.test.mjs covering unauthenticated access, mentor-scoped visibility, mentor write denial, teacher out-of-scope denial, conflict blocking, teacher success, and admin cross-program scheduling.
Updated MVP catalog, backlog, automation memory, artifact registry, handoff ledger, rebuild log, run log, and this manifest.

validation.summary: Local D1 applied 0006_presentation_slots.sql and preserved framework seed counts: requirements=16, deadlines=24, review_gates=4, quality_checks=20.

Aggregate check passed, including alpha contract, cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated-output drift, site options, Cloudflare static checks, 117 tests, and optional typecheck; live Cloudflare verification remained blocked without CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

blockers: Remote D1 apply/verification for migrations/0006_presentation_slots.sql requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for non-interactive Wrangler; live Cloudflare mutation was not attempted.
next_actions: Apply and verify migrations/0006_presentation_slots.sql against remote D1 once CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is available.
Add presentation check-out/check-in endpoints with scoped authorization and audit events.
Surface presentation slot status and conflict/risk cues in mentor/student dashboard flows.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended

phone_tracker.summary: Recorded MVP-017 presentation slot scheduling pass for phone-friendly tracking.
